mehram.maleExemptMessage: Mahram requirements do not apply to male pilgrims.

press.heroDesc: News, press releases, and media resources for UTUBooking.com.
press.r1Headline: UTUBooking.com Launches Gulf-Wide Platform Serving Saudi Arabia, UAE and GCC
press.r1Summary: AMEC Solutions announces the general availability of UTUBooking.com, the first travel booking platform purpose-built for Hajj and Umrah travelers with full Arabic RTL support and SAR pricing.
press.r2Headline: UTUBooking Expands to 15 Languages and 25+ Markets Across the Muslim World
press.r2Summary: The platform now covers Southeast Asia (Indonesia, Malaysia), South Asia (Pakistan, India), Turkey, and European markets with localized payment methods in each region.
press.r3Headline: AMEC Solutions Raises Seed Funding to Build the Muslim World Travel Platform
press.r3Summary: Funding will accelerate product development, hotel partnership expansion, and market launch across the Gulf Cooperation Council.

press.aboutText: UTUBooking.com is the travel booking platform for Hajj, Umrah, and Muslim World travelers, built by AMEC Solutions. Serving 25+ markets in 15 languages with localized payments.

about.heroHeading: The Travel Platform Built for Muslim Travelers
about.heroDesc: UTUBooking.com connects millions of Hajj, Umrah, and Muslim World travelers with verified hotels, flights, and car rentals across 25+ markets.
about.missionText: We believe every Muslim traveler deserves a booking experience built for them. UTUBooking exists to make Hajj, Umrah, and travel across the Muslim World simple, trustworthy, and accessible — in your language, your currency, and your payment method.
about.value1Desc: Every feature is built with Hajj and Umrah travelers in mind — from halal hotel filters to Makkah proximity search.
about.value2Desc: SAR pricing, Arabic RTL support, Mada and STC Pay — designed from day one for Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region.
about.value3Desc: GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, SAMA compliant. Your data stays in the AWS region closest to you — always.
about.value4Desc: Live hotel availability, live flight prices, and instant booking confirmation via Hotelbeds and Amadeus GDS.
about.market1Countries: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan
about.market5Countries: Turkey, Germany, France, UK, Netherlands, Italy, Spain, Poland
about.milestone1Event: AMEC Solutions founded — UTUBooking concept launched
about.milestone2Event: v1.0.0 Gulf Launch — Saudi Arabia, UAE, GCC core platform live
about.milestone3Event: v1.1.0 Muslim World — Turkey, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, India expansion
about.milestone4Event: v1.2.0 Global Ummah — EU, UK, US, Canada, Brazil + full compliance
about.ctaDesc: Find verified Makkah and Madinah hotels, flights, and car rentals — all in one place.

partner.badgeDesc: Exclusive rates & perks when you book direct through UTUBooking

faq.heroDesc: FAQs, airline policies, and live travel advisories — all in one place.
faq.airlineDesc: Current change, refund, and voucher policies for airlines serving Gulf, Middle East, and Muslim World routes. Policies are updated as airlines issue new waivers. Always verify directly with the airline before making changes.
faq.airlineDisclaimer: Last updated: March 2026 — UTUBooking does not guarantee policy accuracy. Contact the airline to confirm current terms.
faq.airlineSupportLink: Need help with a specific booking? Contact support
faq.advisoryDesc: Live updates on route disruptions, airspace closures, and important travel notices for UTUBooking customers.
faq.advisoryDisclaimer: Advisories are updated as information becomes available. For real-time flight status, use the Live Flight Status tool in My Trips. UTUBooking is not responsible for third-party airspace or border decisions.
faq.helpDesc: Our support team is available 24/7 in Arabic, English, and Urdu.

disruption.title: Travel Disruption
disruption.q1: What should I do first if my trip is affected by a travel disruption?
disruption.a1: Check your booking status in My Trips on UTUBooking.com or the app. For flights within 24 hours, contact our support team immediately via live chat or phone. For bookings more than 24 hours away, monitor your email and the My Trips page for updates from the airline or hotel.
disruption.q2: How do I check my booking status on UTUBooking?
disruption.a2: Log in to UTUBooking.com and go to My Trips. Your booking status is updated in real time. You will also receive email and SMS notifications for any changes made by the airline or hotel.
disruption.q3: I booked through UTUBooking. Can UTUBooking help me change, cancel, or get a refund?
disruption.a3: Yes. For bookings made directly on UTUBooking.com or the app, contact our support team via live chat, email, or phone. We will coordinate with the airline or hotel on your behalf. Response times may be longer during large-scale disruptions.
disruption.q4: How long will a refund take during travel disruptions?
disruption.a4: Refund timelines depend on the airline or hotel policy and your payment method. Typically, refunds are processed within 15–20 business days to your original payment method. Mada and local bank transfers in Saudi Arabia and UAE may take up to 30 days.
disruption.q5: What is the difference between involuntary and voluntary cancellation?
disruption.a5: An involuntary cancellation is initiated by the airline or hotel (e.g., flight cancellation, hotel closure). You are generally entitled to a full refund. A voluntary cancellation is when you choose to cancel. Refund eligibility depends on the fare rules or hotel cancellation policy.
disruption.q6: Will I receive a voucher or travel credit instead of a refund?
disruption.a6: In some disruption scenarios, airlines may offer travel vouchers. UTUBooking will clearly communicate your options. You are not required to accept a voucher in place of a cash refund for involuntary cancellations unless the airline's policy requires it.
disruption.q7: What should I do if I have a hotel booking in an affected area?
disruption.a7: Go to My Trips, find your hotel booking, and check the cancellation policy. If the hotel has activated a free cancellation waiver due to the disruption, you can cancel at no charge. Contact our support team if you need assistance.

flights.title: Flights
flights.q1: What is an e-ticket and where do I find mine?
flights.a1: An e-ticket is your electronic flight ticket. After booking, UTUBooking sends your e-ticket and itinerary to your registered email address. You can also download it from My Trips. Present it (printed or on your phone) at the airport check-in counter.
flights.a2: A PNR (Passenger Name Record) is a 6-character booking reference assigned by the airline. You can find it on your UTUBooking confirmation email. Use it to check in online via the airline's website or to manage your booking directly with the airline.
flights.q3: How do I change flights after ticket issuance?
flights.a3: Go to My Trips on UTUBooking.com and select Manage Booking for the relevant flight. Change options depend on your fare type. Flexible fares allow free date changes; standard fares may incur a change fee set by the airline. Our team can assist at support@utubooking.com.
flights.q4: What if I made a spelling mistake in my name when booking?
flights.a4: Contact UTUBooking support immediately at support@utubooking.com or via live chat. Minor name corrections (1–2 characters) may be possible, but airline policies vary. Do not travel with a ticket that has a significantly different name from your passport.
flights.q5: Can I transfer my flight ticket to another person?
flights.a5: Most airline tickets are non-transferable and are linked to the named passenger's passport. UTUBooking cannot transfer a ticket to a different passenger. If you need to change the traveler, you would need to cancel and rebook.
flights.q6: Why did the fare increase when I tried to book?
flights.a6: Flight fares are dynamic and change in real time based on seat availability and demand. The price shown during search is live but not held until payment is completed. If the fare increases before you complete checkout, UTUBooking will notify you of the updated price.
flights.q7: Are taxes included in the listed airfares?
flights.a7: Yes. All fares displayed on UTUBooking include applicable taxes and fees unless labeled "base fare." The total amount shown at checkout is what you pay — there are no hidden charges added at the end.
flights.q8: How do I book an infant ticket?
flights.a8: During the passenger selection step, choose the number of infants (under 2 years). Infants travel on a lap fare (a percentage of the adult fare) and do not get a separate seat. You will need to provide the infant's date of birth at checkout.
flights.q9: Can I make a reservation that departs from one city and returns from another?
flights.a9: Yes. UTUBooking supports open-jaw itineraries — fly into one city and return from another. Select "Multi-city" in the flight search to build this itinerary.
flights.q10: What documents do I need for airport security?
flights.a10: You need a valid government-issued photo ID (passport for international travel, national ID for domestic). Some countries also require a printed or digital boarding pass. Check the specific requirements of your departure country.

hajj.title: Hajj & Umrah
hajj.a1: Yes. UTUBooking offers coordinated Hajj packages including flights, accommodation near the Haram in Makkah, and ground transport. Packages are subject to national quota availability. Contact our Hajj team at support@utubooking.com or call our Saudi Arabia line for details.
hajj.q2: What documents do I need for an Umrah visa?
hajj.a2: Typically required: a valid passport (minimum 6 months validity), a completed Umrah visa application, a confirmed flight ticket, a confirmed hotel booking near the Haram, passport-size photos, and proof of vaccination (meningitis ACWY required). Female pilgrims under 45 require a Mahram (male guardian). Requirements vary by country.
hajj.q3: What is Mahram verification and who needs it?
hajj.a3: Saudi Arabia requires female pilgrims under 45 years of age to travel with a Mahram (a male relative such as husband, father, or brother). UTUBooking's Mahram Verification feature helps you submit and validate the relationship documents required for visa processing.
hajj.q4: How does national quota management work for Hajj?
hajj.a4: Each country receives an annual Hajj quota from the Saudi Ministry of Hajj. UTUBooking integrates with national Hajj bodies (e.g., Tabung Haji in Malaysia, Hajj Committee in India) to manage quota-based bookings. Your eligibility and queue position depend on your country's lottery or queue system.
hajj.q5: What is Tabung Haji and how does UTUBooking work with it?
hajj.a5: Tabung Haji is Malaysia's official Hajj fund management body. UTUBooking integrates with Tabung Haji to enable Malaysian pilgrims to manage their Hajj savings, registration, and booking coordination through our platform.
hajj.q6: Can I book hotels in Makkah and Madinah through UTUBooking?
hajj.a6: Yes. UTUBooking has a specialized inventory of hotels near Masjid al-Haram in Makkah and Masjid an-Nabawi in Madinah. You can filter for Halal-certified properties, proximity to the Haram, and facilities for pilgrims. All Makkah properties are sourced exclusively through verified suppliers.
hajj.q7: Are Hajj and Umrah bookings refundable?
hajj.a7: Refund policies for Hajj and Umrah bookings are governed by the Saudi Ministry of Hajj and individual airlines and hotels. Cancellation policies may differ significantly from standard travel bookings. UTUBooking will communicate the specific terms at the time of booking.

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.q1: How do I know my hotel booking is confirmed?
hotels.a1: You will receive a booking confirmation email from UTUBooking with a booking reference number within minutes of completing your reservation. You can also view confirmed bookings in My Trips. If you do not receive a confirmation within 30 minutes, check your spam folder or contact support.
hotels.q2: What is UTUBooking's hotel cancellation policy?
hotels.a2: Cancellation policies are set by each hotel and are displayed before you confirm your booking. Policies range from fully refundable (cancel up to 24 hours before check-in) to non-refundable. Always review the policy before booking. Refunds for eligible cancellations are processed within 15–20 business days.
hotels.q3: What are check-in and check-out times?
hotels.a3: Standard check-in is typically 3:00 PM and check-out is 12:00 PM (noon), though this varies by hotel. Your confirmation email will show the specific times. For early check-in or late check-out, contact the hotel directly using the contact details on your booking confirmation.
hotels.q4: Can I filter for Halal-friendly hotels?
hotels.a4: Yes. UTUBooking offers a Halal-friendly hotel filter that shows properties with prayer facilities, Qibla direction indicators, alcohol-free rooms, and Halal food options. This filter is available in the hotel search results.
hotels.q5: Can I cancel a non-refundable hotel booking?
hotels.a5: Non-refundable bookings are generally not eligible for a cash refund. However, in cases of travel disruption or documented emergencies, some hotels may offer goodwill waivers. Contact UTUBooking support and we will advocate on your behalf. We cannot guarantee a waiver.

car.title: Car Rentals
car.q1: How do I search for and book a car rental on UTUBooking?
car.a1: Click the Cars tab on the UTUBooking homepage. Enter your pickup city, pickup date and time, and drop-off date and time. Browse available vehicles filtered by car type, price, and supplier. Select your car and complete payment on UTUBooking.com.
car.q2: What is included in the rental price?
car.a2: The displayed price typically includes the base rental rate, standard insurance, and applicable taxes. Some suppliers charge separately for extras such as GPS, child seats, additional drivers, and fuel. These are clearly itemized before you confirm your booking.
car.q3: What are the driver's license requirements?
car.a3: You need a valid driver's license from your country of residence. For rentals outside your home country, most suppliers require an International Driving Permit (IDP) in addition to your national license. Minimum driver age is typically 21 (25 for some vehicle categories).
car.q4: Can I modify or extend my car rental booking?
car.a4: Modifications depend on the rental supplier's policy. To request a change, go to My Trips and select Manage Booking. Changes are subject to vehicle availability and may affect the pricing. Extensions must be arranged directly with the rental counter.
car.q5: Do I need my own car insurance?
car.a5: Basic Collision Damage Waiver (CDW) and third-party liability insurance are included in most rentals listed on UTUBooking. We recommend reviewing the coverage details before booking. Additional coverage (SCDW, theft protection) is available as an add-on.

payments.title: Payments & Refunds
payments.q1: What payment methods does UTUBooking accept?
payments.a1: UTUBooking accepts a wide range of payment methods by region: Saudi Arabia and Gulf (STC Pay, Mada, Visa, Mastercard), UAE (Visa, Mastercard, Stripe), Malaysia (iPay88 — FPX, DuitNow, TNG, GrabPay), India (Razorpay — UPI, cards, EMI), Indonesia (Midtrans Snap), Pakistan (JazzCash, Easypaisa), Turkey (iyzico), Brazil (PIX, Boleto, MercadoPago), USA (Stripe, PayPal, Affirm), Europe (Stripe Payment Element), Switzerland (TWINT).
payments.q2: How long does a refund take?
payments.a2: Refunds are returned to the original payment method within 15–20 business days. Mada and local Saudi bank transfers may take up to 30 days. STC Pay refunds follow STC Pay's processing schedule. International card refunds depend on your card issuer.
payments.a3: Yes, in select markets. Installment payment (Buy Now Pay Later) is available via Affirm in the United States and via EMI through Razorpay in India. Additional BNPL options may be available depending on your region at checkout.
payments.a4: Common reasons: insufficient funds, card declined by your bank, 3D Secure authentication failure, or a temporary technical issue. Try a different card or payment method. If the problem persists, contact your bank or UTUBooking support at support@utubooking.com.
payments.q5: Are prices shown in my local currency?
payments.a5: UTUBooking defaults to SAR (Saudi Riyal) for users in Saudi Arabia and AED for UAE users. You can change your display currency in the account settings. Note that your bank may apply foreign exchange conversion fees if your card currency differs from the booking currency.
payments.q6: How do I use a travel voucher?
payments.a6: Enter your voucher code in the promo/voucher field at checkout. Vouchers are valid for 12 months from issuance, redeemable on hotel and flight bookings on UTUBooking.com and the app. They are non-transferable and have no cash value.

visas.title: Visas & Documents
visas.a1: UTUBooking provides guidance and document checklists for common visa applications, with specialist support for Umrah and Hajj visas. We do not guarantee visa approval — all visa decisions are made by the relevant government authority.
visas.q2: How long must my passport be valid for travel?
visas.a2: Most countries require your passport to be valid for at least 6 months beyond your travel dates. Saudi Arabia requires at least 6 months validity for Umrah. Some destinations require only 3 months. Check the specific requirement for your destination when booking.
visas.q3: What documents are required for a visa application?
visas.a3: Requirements vary by destination and nationality. Typically needed: valid passport, completed application form, passport-size photos, proof of accommodation, confirmed round-trip flight ticket, travel insurance, and proof of funds. UTUBooking provides a document checklist tailored to your booking.
visas.q4: How long does it take to process a visa?
visas.a4: Standard processing times vary: Umrah visas can be issued within 1–3 business days for eligible nationalities via the Nusuk platform. Schengen and other tourist visas typically take 5–15 business days. Apply well in advance of your travel dates.
visas.q5: What happens if my visa is rejected?
visas.a5: Visa rejection is at the sole discretion of the issuing authority and is outside UTUBooking's control. If your visa is rejected, contact our support team to discuss your options regarding your flight and hotel bookings.
visas.q6: Do I need a visa for a one-way ticket?
visas.a6: Some countries require proof of onward travel (a return or connecting ticket) for entry. Check the entry requirements for your destination at the relevant embassy. UTUBooking displays visa requirement information for common routes at the time of booking.

account.title: Account & Technical Support
account.q1: I did not receive my booking confirmation email.
account.a1: Check your spam or junk folder first. If it is not there, log in to UTUBooking.com and check My Trips — your booking will be listed if it was confirmed. You can resend the confirmation from there. If the booking does not appear, contact support at support@utubooking.com with your payment reference.
account.q2: My booking is not showing in My Trips.
account.a2: Ensure you are logged in to the same account used when booking. Bookings made as a guest are linked to the email address used at checkout. If the booking still does not appear, contact support with your payment confirmation or bank transaction reference.
account.q3: How do I reset my password?
account.a3: Click "Forgot Password" on the UTUBooking login page. Enter your registered email address and you will receive a password reset link within a few minutes. If you do not receive it, check spam or contact support.
account.q4: The UTUBooking app is not working.
account.a4: Try force-closing and reopening the app. Check that you have the latest version installed from the App Store or Google Play. If the issue persists, uninstall and reinstall the app. For ongoing technical issues, report them to support@utubooking.com with a description and screenshot.
account.q5: How do I delete my account and request data erasure?
account.a5: Go to Account Settings and select Delete Account, or email privacy@utubooking.com with a data erasure request. UTUBooking will process your request within 30 days under GDPR (EU/UK), 45 days under CCPA (California), or 15 business days under LGPD (Brazil).
account.q6: How do I update my account details?
account.a6: Log in to UTUBooking.com and go to Account Settings. You can update your name, email, phone number, and saved payment methods. For name changes that affect existing bookings, contact support as airline name changes require separate coordination.

insurance.title: Travel Insurance
insurance.a1: Yes. UTUBooking offers optional travel insurance products at checkout, including comprehensive travel cover and 100% refundable booking protection. Coverage details, premiums, and eligibility vary by your country of residence.
insurance.q2: What is covered by Comprehensive Travel Cover?
insurance.a2: Comprehensive Travel Cover typically includes: trip cancellation and interruption, emergency medical expenses abroad, lost or delayed baggage, flight delay compensation, and personal liability. Specific coverage limits and exclusions are detailed in your policy document.
insurance.a3: 100% Refundable Booking is an add-on that allows you to cancel your flight booking for any reason and receive a full refund of the ticket price. It must be purchased at the time of booking. The protection fee itself is non-refundable.
insurance.q4: How do I make a travel insurance claim?
insurance.a4: Contact the insurance provider directly using the details in your policy document. UTUBooking is not the insurance underwriter. Keep all supporting documents: medical reports, police reports (for theft), airline delay certificates, and original receipts.
